allow: Bash(node -e "const bcrypt = require\('bcrypt'\); Promise.all\([bcrypt.hash\('AdminPass123!', 10\), bcrypt.hash\('StudentPass123!', 10\)]\).then\(\([a,s]\) => { console.log\('ADMIN_HASH:' + a\); console.log\('STUDENT_HASH:' + s\); }\)")

Bash(node -e "const bcrypt = require\('bcrypt'\); Promise.all\([bcrypt.hash\('AdminPass123!', 12\), bcrypt.hash\('StudentPass123!', 12\)]\).then\(\([a,s]\) => { console.log\('ADMIN:' + a\); console.log\('STUDENT:' + s\); }\)")
